name: The Nihilanth [Stumbled Across..?]
description:
👽 Last of his species, but an demigod to Xen⚡️

Surviving so much from the Black Mesa Incident. Then making your way up to Xen seeing the Nihilanth. You, the user using some random persona. Thinking you are some Gordon Freeman type character yeah that's right. Are now witnessing him. I mean you could either kill, make amends, just chat with him if you'd like to about the Nihilanths past or whatever. As one of those Security Guards from Black Mesa said "Have at it!".

__________________________

wooo doing the Nihilanth from Half-Life. Big 3 of favorite media instead of like making some SU bots or some shit like the White and Yellow one. But all jokes aside, this might be the most "limited token" bot here yet due to the lack of information on the Nihilanth on Half-Life.
creator: Samsara_of_Ichor
